subcodes.first_line: O thou pure leaf! Thy lamentation hath ascended to the heaven of Oneness and the sighing of thy heart hath saddened
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطهره ناله ات بسماء احدیه مرتفع شده و حنین قلبت سکان جنان رحمانرا
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @nearness and remoteness, @suffering and imprisonment
